title: About Me
subtitle: Applied AI & Full-Stack Software Engineer
description: I'm Sadique Iqbal — a software engineer who ships complete products, from the app in your hand to the AI and data systems behind it. I lead Flutter development professionally, but I'm equally at home building backends in FastAPI, Spring Boot, or Express, and I pick up new languages fast when a problem calls for it. On the AI side, I design and build multi-agent systems end to end with Google ADK, Genkit, and LangGraph, integrate LLMs and Hugging Face transformers, and take machine-learning work all the way through — cleaning and preparing data, drawing insights, and training and tuning models in Python and R with scikit-learn and TensorFlow, including deep-learning architectures like CNNs, GANs, and autoencoders. I use AI as a working partner to move fast without cutting corners.
highlights: Full-stack: Flutter, plus FastAPI, Spring Boot & Express backends
Applied AI: end-to-end multi-agent systems with Google ADK, Genkit & LangGraph
ML & data science: data prep, training & tuning in Python and R (scikit-learn, TensorFlow)
Deep learning: CNNs, GANs, and autoencoders
Cloud: Firebase (full suite) and Google Cloud Platform
Polyglot — comfortable learning and coding in any language
